calendar.matters:
Petition For Termination Of Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Sandra Merrill, Warren Merrill, Barbara Moore And Edward G.
Off Calendar Sep-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jamie Couche for Homer Richards. Dwayne Perry for and with Leslie Hartman (Respondent/Trustee).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of whether the petition only asks for termination and not modification of the Trust, whether the Court has discretion to terminate the Trust, whether there are changed circumstances that prevent fulfillment of the Trustor's intent to provide for educational purposes for the Grandchildren, spoke of the terms of the Trust, the net income of the Trust, etc. The Petition for Termination of Trust, etc. was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition For Termination Of Trust; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Sandra Merrill, Warren Merrill, Barbara Moore And Edward G.
Off Calendar Aug-11-2014 Continued To Sep-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jamie Couche for Homer Richards (Petitioner). Dwayne Perry for and with Lelsie Hartman (Trustee/Respondent).

Mr. Perry raised the issue of the Trustee having to consider all resources available to the Beneficiaries, tax consequences, payment of a law degree for one of the grandchildren, etc. and requested a continuance stating that he was waiting for documents he ordered from the Santa Clara Superior Court. The Petition for Termination of Trust, etc. was continued to September 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
